quotes: Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller
Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller (§1.2).

rules.intent: Ensure clinical claims are properly qualified and substantiated.
rules.rule_text: Clinical claims require footnote markers (footnote.marker.symbol = †) with footnote text clearly separated and rendered noticeably smaller than body copy (per §1.2).

quotes: Patient quotes: attributed as `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, italic or distinguished styling, paired with warm lifestyle imagery.

rules.intent: Consistent, authentic presentation of patient testimonials.
rules.rule_text: Patient quotes must be attributed in the form `- [Name], LISRAYA patient`, set in italic or otherwise distinguished styling (text_style.patient_quote.italic), and paired with warm lifestyle imagery (image_treatment.photography.warm_lifestyle).

effect.subject: Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI

quotes: all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**
Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

rules.intent: Prevent duplication/alteration of mandated legal and regulatory content outside locked components.
rules.rule_text: The Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live exclusively in the locked header/footer components and must never be reproduced within body sections.
